mapper.select: /** UsptLastSlctnObjcReqstDao.select */ select last_slctn_objc_reqst_id , last_slctn_trget_id , objc_reqst_cn , objc_reqst_dt , objc_applcnt_id , last_slctn_objc_process_sttus_cd , dlbrt_de , dlbrt_cn , dlbrt_opetr_id , applcnt_attachment_group_id , dlbrt_attachment_group_id , reject_reason_cn , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_last_slctn_objc_reqst where last_slctn_objc_reqst_id = #{lastSlctnObjcReqstId}
